title: Update containers/storage, containers/image, and containers/buildah
body: Bump `github.com/containers/storage`, and versions of `github.com/containers/image` and `github.com/projectatomic/buildah` that work with it.

comments.body: Currently vendors the proposed changes from https://github.com/containers/image/pull/505 and https://github.com/containers/buildah/pull/1024; this can't be merged until those have been resolved.
FAH28 failure is the known exit 1 after successful tests
Sorry for the spam here, we're testing new CI
@mheon No worries; it's instructive.
I'm fairly certain the validate failures can be ignored at this point, that's not quite working yet
/test validate
This will obsolete #1471.

I think the use of `$GIT_CHECK_EXCLUDE` with `git-validation` ends up requiring at least git 1.9.0 in order for the arguments that `git-validation` adds to its invocations of `git` when that environment variable is set to not trigger the `fatal: Invalid pathspec magic 'exclude' in ':(exclude)./vendor'` error.
@nalind https://github.com/vbatts/git-validation/issues/37 to track
